meta.notes: Colors normalized to SAP Horizon; image payloads are @{…} placeholders resolved from the brand pack at emit time (no base64 in this file).

backend-box.notes: essentials.xml 'On-Premise' rounded box (202x70 group; inner rect 197x70). Icon inset padX=14 (28.24x30); text starts at x=52.

badge-hyperscaler.notes: BRANDART hyperscaler logo badge (Azure preferred). SSAM embeds hyperscaler logos as unlabeled base64 images (not selectable); Brandart carries an identifiable logo image. image→@{hyperscaler}. AWS logo also present (55x37)

badge-runtime.notes: A CF-specific cell exists in the all-size-M library ('10017-sap-btp_cloud-foundry-runtime_sd' — entries are titled only by tech-id, not friendly name); its style skeleton is byte-identical to the generic service-icon skeleton, which we reuse with @{runtime}. The concrete CF/Kyma logo is supplied at emit time (brand pack cf-badge).

btp-area.notes: essentials.xml 'BTP base layer' outer blue area (arcSize=32). The SAP-logo chip is a separate child image cell at (18.55,18.55) 67.25x18.55 (see brand pack @{sap-logo-chip}).

capability-chip.notes: SSAM white rounded capability chip: the SBPA product box's child panel enclosing the 'Decision' label. SSAM draws capabilities as ONE white chip with an icon grid (no per-capability rects). Icon grid measured from enclosed image cells (rows/cols clustered at 8px tolerance): padX/padTop = top-left icon offset, gapX/gapY = column/row pitch, labelDy = label top relative to its icon. Exemplar icon columns are uneven (pitches 87.36, 97.28); gapX records the first (canonical) pitch.

chip.notes: SNAM client chip 'PAS' (small white chip, SAP blue border).

custom-app-box.notes: BRANDART container of 'Procurement Application' (custom app card); fill #ECF8FF→#EBF8FF, SAP blue border.

db.from: SNAM (fallback cylinder; DBs are chips, e.g. 'LdbYgzVHhqlvVjTfUb5K-67' 'SAP HANA DB')
db.notes: Canonical draw.io cylinder fallback (sanctioned by the mapping): SNAM has no cylinder/datastore shape, it renders databases as blue label chips. Colors adopt SNAM's DB palette (SAP blue border, white fill); geometry is a standard datastore default.

edge-identity.notes: SSAM identity edge (green #188918); routing anchors + fontColor default→#1D2D3E normalized. Semantic family: identity/authentication flows.

edge-master-data.notes: SSAM master-data edge (magenta). Some SSAM cells use #CB00DC; normalized to the Horizon #CC00DC. Semantic family: master-data replication flows.

edge-provisioning.notes: SSAM provisioning edge (purple #470BED, SCIM). Semantic family: user/identity provisioning flows.

edge-transport.notes: SSAM dashed transport edge (grey #475E75, dashed=1). Semantic family: transport / change-movement flows.

governance-strip.notes: SSAM outer BTP box (fill #EBF8FF) enclosing 'Subaccount: Governance'.

network-separator.notes: SAP_Task_Center_L1 NETWORK zone separator: the vertical grey bar (#5B738B, strokeWidth=3, jumpStyle=gap). Its caption is the separate molecule 'network-separator-label'. Line height (h) is the exemplar span; layout drives the real length.

network-separator-label.notes: SAP_Task_Center_L1 NETWORK zone caption: the text cell placed beside the network-separator bar (see that molecule for the line style).

persona.notes: essentials.xml 'User and client' is a composite (client device + user avatar + labels, group 152x174.11); persona captures the user-figure image cell. image→@{persona} placeholder (brand pack / icon atlas).

pill-interface.notes: annotations_and_interfaces.xml 'Interface SAP' pill (arcSize=50); strokeColor #0070f3→#0070F2, fillColor default→#FFFFFF.

pill-protocol.notes: SSAM green protocol pill 'OIDC' (arcSize=50); fillColor #f5fae5→#F5FAE5, fontColor #266f3a→#188918. Cross-checked vs official 'Authenticate' pill (annotations_and_interfaces.xml): same arcSize-50 green pill pattern.

product-box.notes: SSAM container of 'SAP Build Process Automation'; fill #ECF8FF→#EBF8FF. padX = title icon+gap inset before the title text. titleRow = inner white content panel top offset (48.08).

sap-btp-chip.notes: sap_brand_names.xml 'SAP BTP (Text Only)' text-only chip (no image); fontColor default→#1D2D3E. Extra key owned by this contract per the manifest.

service-icon.notes: First service icon cell of the official all-services (size M) library; square 32x32. image→@{service}. Per-level render size (L1=48, L2=32) is owned by _zone_layout, not this reference geometry.

step-circle.notes: numbers.xml 'default number' ellipse (30x30); fillColor #5b738b→#5B738B, fontColor default→#1D2D3E. gradientColor endpoint #223548 is the authentic SAP number gradient (not in the flat Horizon set; not palette-guarded).

subaccount-frame.notes: SSAM tightest white rounded frame (blue border) enclosing the 'Subaccount: Extension …' label; padX/padTop measured from the label offset.

tier-box-nonsap.from: SSAM:dVOzu-b0-3d0ZhwuQH19-483 (Any-Premise, stroke recolored to non-SAP grey)
tier-box-nonsap.notes: SSAM box of 'Any-Premise'. The exemplar drew a blue (#0070F2) border; recolored to the official SAP non-SAP grey #475E75 (essentials '3rd party layer') so non-SAP tiers read distinctly from SAP tiers. Fill kept #FFFFFF.

tier-box-sap.notes: SSAM tier box of 'Public Cloud' (SAP blue border, white fill).

watermark.notes: BRANDART Lutech watermark: largest semi-transparent (opacity=15) image cell. Opacity preserved; image→@{watermark} (brand pack, local-only).
